title: Rename or relocate INV-RBAC-001-allowlist.json so spec-validate-invariants skips it
description: spec-validate-all scans every INV-*.json under docs/architecture/invariants/ and fails the allowlist file (16 errors: required fields + additionalProperties). The allowlist is data for INV-RBAC-001, not an invariant. Closure: either rename to 'RBAC-001-allowlist.json' (no INV- prefix) and update INV-RBAC-001 references, or move to docs/architecture/invariant-data/. Verify: devai spec-validate-all --human shows 0 errors on invariants in path.
